introSection: Corkscrew Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Rainbow's End in Manukau City, Auckland, New Zealand.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: White track and supports. The second corkscrew is painted like a rainbow.

fullText:
Corkscrew Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Rainbow's End in Manukau City, Auckland, New Zealand.



White track and supports. The second corkscrew is painted like a rainbow.
